"[6] [Appended, 14:56:05] [1] [14:52:21 GMT-07:00 16 Jul 2026] (818) 307-4075 has entered the chat[14:52:21 GMT-07:00 16 Jul 2026] (818) 307-4075: A user is requesting emergency services from an Apple device via satellite. Transmit and receive times may be longer than for cellular SMS. User responses may be delayed due to satellite movements.The user CANNOT MAKE OR RECEIVE A VOICE CALL because they are outside cellular coverage.Time of request: 09:50PM UTC. SHARON BELSON requested emergency services near these coordinates: Latitude 34.0538 (N), Longitude -118.6965 (W).[14:52:21 GMT-07:00 16 Jul 2026] (818) 307-4075: The user's iPhone detected a VEHICLE CRASH that is LIKELY TO HAVE RESULTED IN INJURY.It is UNKNOWN how many OCCUPANTS may have been in the vehicle.This concludes the automatically-assembled data. You may now attempt to contact the user. However, messages may be delayed, and the user may not be able to respond.[14:52:22 GMT-07:00 16 Jul 2026] (818) 307-4075: This Emergency SOS via satellite session was transferred to the Emergency Relay Center because no PSAP response was received. You may receive or have received a relay voice call for an incident with this same location data. Please verify that your TCC connection and text handling systems are functioning normally, and that dispatchers are logged in to receive texts to avoid relay fallback for future Emergency SOS via satellite sessions. To reach the Emergency Relay Center call 620-317-0404 or toll-free 855-251-2181.[14:52:22 GMT-07:00 16 Jul 2026] (818) 307-4075: Responders may need to search an area extending at least 10 meters in all directions for a 95% chance of finding the user.The user's estimated altitude (HAE) is 62 meters. Responders may need to search 20 meters above and below this level for a 95% chance of finding the user.The user has cached Enhanced Emergency Data with Apple. QUERY ADDITIONAL DATA!The battery level of the user's device is 61-100%. Their phone number is +18183074075.[14:52:22 GMT-07:00 16 Jul 2026] (818) 307-4075: SYSTEM: We received your 9-1-1 text message.
